notes:
## v0.1.7 — AI & speech processing

**New**
- Bilingual mode — seamless two-language dictation with auto-detect between your language pair
- LLM post-processing via a local llama.cpp server (Rewrite, Formal, Summarize, Grammar)
- Intelligent voice commands — new paragraph, delete last sentence, all caps, send message, and more
- LLM connection test button in Transcription settings

**Changed**
- Check for updates button moved to the right in System settings
- Voice commands disabled by default for safer out-of-the-box dictation
- LLM post-processing falls back faster when the local server is offline

**Fixed**
- Voice commands no longer misinterpret "Punkt" and "Komma" inside normal German sentences
- One-time migration disables previously auto-enabled voice commands that broke dictation
- LLM post-processing section now appears in Transcription settings
